task_completion.description: Verify that the Odoo Employees application is accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo web interface is visible, showing the Employees app dashboard (e.g., a kanban or list view of employees).

task_completion.description: Verify that Audrey Peterson's employee profile is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The detailed employee profile page for 'Audrey Peterson' is displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Work Schedule has been updated to the requested part-time schedule.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Work Schedule' field (typically found under the 'Work Information' tab) is set to 'Part Time 20 Hours'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent initiated the process to log an internal note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Log note' composer/text area is active in the chatter section (usually on the right side or bottom of the profile).

task_completion.description: Verify that the internal note was successfully logged with the correct text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A saved internal note is visible in the chatter history containing the exact text: 'Transitioned to part-time schedule effective immediately.' (Must at least contain the words 'part-time' and 'effective').

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the Odoo UI, rather than a terminal window executing scripts or API commands.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface is clearly the Odoo web application, not a text editor, mock interface, or static HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify that the changes were genuinely saved in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The profile does not show unsaved changes indicators (like a prominent 'Save' button that hasn't been clicked), and the logged note appears in the permanent chatter history.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Employee: 'Audrey Peterson'. Target Work Schedule: 'Part Time 20 Hours'. Required Note Text: 'Transitioned to part-time schedule effective immediately.' (The verifier specifically checks for the fragments 'part-time' and 'effective' in the note body).
